# Ray Tracing

**Summary**: A method to calculate the path of seismic waves and determine critical angles for phase changes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-felemban|Felemban, 2024]] applied ray-tracing to determine maximum allowable offsets before reaching critical angles in various formations.

## Key Results and Findings

- The back-propagation method was used to calculate the angle of incidence in the first formation (Quaternary) to ensure it remained below 11.1 degrees for Shuaiba. ([[2024-felemban|Felemban, 2024, p. 57]])
